title: Browserbase Session
description: Schema for the Browserbase Session object returned from POST /v1/sessions and related endpoints. Represents a cloud Chromium browser session that an agent or automation client can drive via Playwright, Puppeteer, Stagehand, or CDP.

SessionCreate.description: Request body for creating a Browserbase session.

projectId.description: Identifier of the Browserbase project under which to bill and group this session.

extensionId.description: Optional previously-uploaded Chrome extension to load into the session.

context.description: Reuse a previously created context for cookies, localStorage, and authenticated state.

persist.description: Whether changes made during this session should be written back to the context.

blockAds.description: When true, block known ad and tracker domains.

solveCaptchas.description: When true, route CAPTCHAs through Browserbase's solving pipeline.

recordSession.description: When true, record an rrweb replay of the session.

logSession.description: When true, capture console, request, and response logs.

ignoreCertificateErrors.description: When true, ignore TLS certificate errors.

timeout.description: Inactivity timeout in seconds before the session is auto-released.

keepAlive.description: When true, keep the session alive across reconnects until explicitly released.

proxies.description: Either a boolean toggle for Browserbase-managed proxies, or an array of proxy configurations.

region.description: Geographic region to run the session in.

userMetadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata attached to the session.

connectUrl.description: WebSocket URL used by Playwright/Puppeteer/Stagehand to connect to the session over CDP.

seleniumRemoteUrl.description: Selenium-compatible remote driver URL for the session.

signingKey.description: Short-lived key used to sign reconnect requests to the session.

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the Chromium process began running.

expiresAt.description: Timestamp at which the session will be auto-released.

region.description: Region the session is running in.

keepAlive.description: Whether keepAlive was requested on creation.
